message.content:
Values
Ambition
Having a humble
beginning, it’s the ambition
that has helped us achieve
what we have today. The
same ambition that all
DCCians share in
common.
Speed
Technology moves fast; we
move faster. Since 1991, DCC
has set the pace in IT
distribution and service,
ensuring that the right
products and world-class
support are delivered exactly
when they are needed.
Honesty
Where ambition fuels our
growth, it’s the honesty that
has kept it intact. Honesty in
products and services that
enhance the customer
experience.
Teamwork
It’s the teamwork that is
making the dream work.
Dream to become a reliable
tech partner for every
individual
Hard work
A thousand hardworking
hands ensuring the right
products and services are
available at the right place and
at the right time.
Happiness
Ambition, honesty, hard work,
teamwork, and speed lead to one
single goal: happiness for our clients,
partners, and employees.
